subject: Databases
title: LEFT JOIN Keeps All Left Rows
description: Learn LEFT JOIN Keeps All Left Rows in one minute.

hook.text: You want all users, even those without orders. LEFT JOIN keeps every row from the left table.

buildup.text: SELECT * FROM users LEFT JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id. All users appear.

discovery.text: Users without orders have NULL in every order column. That's how you spot the unmatched rows.

twist.text: WHERE orders.id IS NULL finds users who never ordered. A LEFT JOIN plus a NULL check is a powerful pattern.

climax.text: LEFT JOIN is essential for reports: show all products, even those never sold.

punchline.text: LEFT JOIN: everyone on the left shows up, matched or not.

quiz.question: How can you find users who have never placed an order using LEFT JOIN?
options: LEFT JOIN orders then filter WHERE orders.id IS NULL
Use INNER JOIN and check for empty rows
LEFT JOIN automatically excludes users without orders
